summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements including blog system upgrades, backend data model changes, frontend form updates, color scheme changes, logo/navigation updates, and footer rebuilding. However, several requirements have only partial evidence or are missing entirely from the diff: the dedicated Weight Management and Lifestyle subcategory pages with full remedy content (REQ-6, REQ-7), the 10 pre-seeded draft blog posts (REQ-13), and some specific homepage sections (REQ-3 exact content). The diff references file summaries for many pages but lacks actual content to verify all subcategory pages and seeded posts exist.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add dedicated Weight Management category pages with at least three subcategory pages (herbs/teas for weight loss, Ayurvedic diet/metabolism, yoga/lifestyle tips), each with at least 3 remedies including ingredients, steps, benefits, and frequency.
missing_requirements.reason: The file summaries mention HealthRemediesPage, SkinCarePage, HairCarePage but no WeightManagementPage subcategory pages are listed. The diff shows no files for /weight-management/ subcategory routes with remedy content.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add dedicated Lifestyle category pages with at least three subcategory pages (Dinacharya, stress management, Ayurvedic nutrition/seasonal eating), each with meaningful Ayurvedic lifestyle content.
missing_requirements.reason: No Lifestyle subcategory page files appear in the diff or file summaries. The file summaries only reference HealthRemediesPage, SkinCarePage, HairCarePage as category pages.

missing_requirements.requirement: Pre-populate the blog section with 10 SEO blog post topics as draft placeholder posts with correct titles, categories, saved as drafts.
missing_requirements.reason: No seeding logic, migration data, or initialization code for the 10 pre-defined blog posts is visible in any of the diff files. The backend/main.mo and migration.mo show data model changes but no pre-seeded post data.

missing_requirements.requirement: All six main category landing pages with subcategories must exist and be navigable with no broken links. Weight Management and Lifestyle must each have at least 3 subcategory pages.
missing_requirements.reason: Weight Management and Lifestyle subcategory pages are not evidenced in the diff. File summaries only show Health Remedies, Skin Care, and Hair Care category pages.

hallucinated_features.description: A migration module (backend/migration.mo) was added to migrate old BlogPost data to the new schema.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specified updating the backend BlogPost model (REQ-12) within the single main actor file. A separate migration module file was not requested, and the constraint explicitly says to keep all Motoko backend logic within backend/main.mo.
